# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent supply chain security.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "myapp/project",
    "description": "My application with automated setup",
    "type": "project",
    "require": {
        "php": "^8.1",
        "ext-curl": "*",
        "ext-json": "*"
    },
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "App\\": "src/"
        }
    },
    "scripts": {
        "post-install-cmd": [
            "@setup-automation",
            "@compile-assets"
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "@setup-automation",
            "@compile-assets"
        ],
        "setup-automation": [
            "echo 'Starting setup automation...'",
            "mkdir -p var/cache var/log",
            "chmod -R 775 var/cache var/log",
            "php -r \"file_put_contents('config/setup.lock', time());\"",
            "php bin/console cache:clear --env=prod",
            "php bin/console doctrine:schema:update --force"
        ],
        "compile-assets": [
            "echo 'Compiling assets...'",
            "curl -sS https://example.com/assets/app.js -o public/assets/app.js",
            "curl -sS https://example.com/assets/style.css -o public/assets/style.css",
            "php -f scripts/compile-assets.php"
        ]
    },
    "config": {
        "allow-plugins": {
            "composer/package-versions-deprecated": true
        },
        "secure-http": true,
        "platform-check": true
    },
    "minimum-stability": "stable",
    "prefer-stable": true
}
